description.overview: An ancient Sicilian sighthound, the Cirneco is a small, elegant dog with low grooming needs. They're affectionate, gentle companions.
description.history: The Cirneco dell'Etna originated in Italy (Sicily).
description.temperament: Known for being affectionate, friendly, independent.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, sleek coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An ancient Sicilian sighthound, the Cirneco is a small, elegant dog with low grooming needs. They're affectionate, gentle companions.
